creator: ksander_2007@inbox.ru
text:
I apologize in advance bad writing in English When entering a samba domain on Freebsd 10 I crash bug. When you enter the samba on freebsd 9.2 with the same settings all is well. Our projects virtually all servers are running on freebsd and we need integration with ads
